name: frigg
description: Intercept, inspect and mock HTTP(S) traffic from Android/iOS devices, emulators and simulators

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c green,cyan "npm run dev -w @frigg/server" "npm run dev -w @frigg/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @frigg/server && npm run build -w @frigg/web
